name: Ribbed Pouf Ottoman Cream - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring texture and practical style to your interior decor with the Ribbed Pouf Ottoman from Room Essentials™. This cream ottoman is round and features an allover ribbed design for an eye-catching look that spruces up your decor or dorm furniture. Designed with a soft fabric upholstery, this pouf ottoman is so comfortable to sit or rest your feet.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall Width : 16" Inches
Overall Depth : 16" Inches
Overall Height : 16" Inches
